features.title: TLS 1.3 Encryption
features.description: All transfers use HTTPS with TLS 1.3. Data in transit is fully encrypted and protected from interception.

features.title: Premium Password Encryption
features.description: AES-GCM 256-bit encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation via Web Crypto API.

features.title: xxHash128 Integrity Verification
features.description: Hash calculated on the sender side and verified on the receiver side to guarantee zero tampering.

features.title: Ephemeral Cloud Chunks
features.description: File chunks transit temporarily through Cloudflare R2 and are deleted immediately after download. Bam!'s own servers never store file content.

features.title: Burn-on-Read
features.description: Self-destructing link mode: the link expires after the first completed download.

features.title: GDPR Compliant
features.description: Full compliance with the European Data Protection Regulation.
